creator: gmbroome@vcu.edu
text:
Marius,

Nevermind tomorrow- I had a chance to get the debugging output immediately.

After attempting to boot the debug kernel you provided,

The result of "ctrace" is:
---------------------------------------------

PC: c07dc388
Last leaf: XXXXXXX     from c07dc350
       0 w   %o0-%o5   (c0b93888 4b0 8 1 0 4 )

---------------------------------------------


and the result of "ftrace" is:
---------------------------------------------

         0
Fast Data Access MMU Miss

---------------------------------------------

Sincerely,
Guy M. Broome
